The injured are currently receiving medical attention at a local hospital.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/maharashtra-8-dead-8-injured-as-vehicle-falls-at-chandshali-ghat-in-nandurbar/articleshow/124660448.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/maharashtra-8-dead-8-injured-as-vehicle-falls-at-chandshali-ghat-in-nandurbar/articleshow/124660448.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 18 Oct 2025 14:03:05 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="24314" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124660515,imgsize-24314.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <title><![CDATA[India-US trade talks show progress, no major differences: Government sources]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/world/india-us-trade-talks-progress-no-major-differences-government-sources-19721727.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India's trade delegation has concluded its visit to the US, with government sources reporting that discussions with American officials progressed smoothly and "no major differences" emerged. Despite high tariffs, India's exports to the US grew 13.3% in the first half of the year, reflecting resilience amid global trade challenges. The Commerce Ministry highlighted ongoing efforts to diversify energy imports and monitor the tariff impact on key sectors.]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[Polio-Like Moment in Vision Care? Lenskart’s Plan To Be The Eyewear Capital Of The World ]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/access/watchlist/business/polio-like-moment-in-vision-care-lenskarts-plan-to-be-the-eyewear-capital-of-the-world-19720140.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[From disrupting a dull category to transforming eyewear into a lifestyle, Lenskart has reimagined how India sees.With 2,700+ stores across 14 countries and 22 million units sold in FY25, it now ranks among Asia’s top two spectacles retailers by volume and is now eyeing an IPO estimated at ₹7,500–₹8,000 crore.On the latest episode of Young Turks Reloaded, Shereen Bhan catches up with Peyush Bansal, Chairman, MD & CEO of Lenskart, on the vision, breakthroughs, and bold bets driving the brand’s global ambition.When Lenskart began, organised eyewear retail in India was minimal, and glasses were seen mainly as medical prescriptions. “Half of India’s population needs glasses, yet two-thirds don’t wear any,” Bansal notes. Lenskart transformed the consumer experience, making eyewear fun and accessible through virtual try-ons, personalised experiences, and removing the “patient” label.  While India is often called the “blind capital of the world,” Lenskart aspires to become the “eyewear capital of the world.” But the reality is stark: India has only 60 eyewear stores per million people, compared to 1,200 jewellery stores. From the first pitch to filing the DRHP, the mission has remained constant: provide vision to a billion people. The Lenskart CEO envisions a future where eye tests can be conducted on smartphones, dramatically increasing accessibility and potentially eliminating myopia-related challenges - what Bansal calls the “polio moment” for vision care, because he believes, “Everyone should have the right to see.”]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Fri, 17 Oct 2025 16:06:38 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Zenia Baria</dc:creator>
      <guid><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/access/watchlist/business/polio-like-moment-in-vision-care-lenskarts-plan-to-be-the-eyewear-capital-of-the-world-19720140.htm]]></guid>
      <category><![CDATA[Business]]></category>
      <media:content height="675" width="1200" medium="image" url="https://images.cnbctv18.com/uploads/2025/10/1760697420_IwFBtjWI10-YT-RELOADED-EP-THUMBSpng-MKZqfa0k58.png"/>
    </item>

      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/bombay-high-court-stays-18-pc-gst-on-hotel-restaurants-legal-debate-rekindles-over-fair-tax-classification-19715800.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[The Bombay High Court, Aurangabad bench, has granted an interim stay on any coercive action in cases where there is 18% GST levied on restaurants located in hotels with room tariffs above ₹7,500 per day. This raises questions on the constitutional validity of rate differentiation, claim experts. The case challenges the linkage of restaurant tax to hotel room pricing, with the next hearing scheduled for November 19.]]></description>

      <dc:creator>Megha Rani</dc:creator>

      <title><![CDATA[FHRAI seeks GST relief for hospitality sector; calls for regularisation of past dues, restoration of ITC, and delinking of F&B rates from room tariffs]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/fhrai-gst-relief-hospitality-sector-itc-restoration-fb-rate-delinking-19715804.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[The Federation of Hotel & Restaurant Associations of India (FHRAI) has urged the government to simplify the GST regime for the hospitality sector, citing years of disputes caused by interpretational ambiguities and policy inconsistencies. It has sought regularisation of pending tax cases, restoration of input tax credit benefits, and delinking of restaurant GST rates from hotel room tariffs to create a more balanced and transparent system. The industry body believes these measures would not only ease compliance and reduce litigation but also enhance the sector’s competitiveness and contribution to India’s growth story.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Tue, 14 Oct 2025 19:27:22 +0530]]></pubDate>
